info.title: VaultLister API
info.description: REST API for VaultLister 3.0 — multi-channel reselling platform. Most endpoints require a Bearer JWT token in the Authorization header.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Registration, login, sessions, MFA, password reset

tags.name: automations
tags.description: Automation rules, presets, run history, scheduling

tags.name: ai
tags.description: AI-powered listing generation, price suggestions, translation
